name: c-cpp-project-manager-and-build
description: Create, organize, build, run and debug generic C/C++ workspaces and projects with GCC, MinGW or another configurable toolchain.

viewsWelcome.contents:

labwindowsCvi.installations.description: Known C/C++ toolchain root or bin directories detected or added manually.

labwindowsCvi.activeInstallation.description: Selected C/C++ toolchain root or bin directory. Leave empty to use automatic detection from PATH and common MinGW/MSYS2/Clang locations.

labwindowsCvi.buildMode.description: Build mode used by the generic C/C++ build pipeline. Debug modes add -g -O0; release modes add -O2.

labwindowsCvi.customBuildConfiguration.description: Optional C/C++ custom build configuration name passed through -config=...

labwindowsCvi.extraCompilerArguments.description: Legacy compatibility setting. For the generic C/C++ build pipeline, prefer compilerFlags, cCompilerFlags or cppCompilerFlags.

labwindowsCvi.runArguments.description: Arguments passed to the active executable when running it.

labwindowsCvi.projectFormatVersion.description: Version value used when generating new .cws and .prj files. The default matches the supplied C/C++ 2012 examples.

labwindowsCvi.autoLoadWorkspace.description: Automatically load a .cws file when the opened VS Code folder contains exactly one C/C++ workspace.

labwindowsCvi.autoConfigureCppTools.description: Automatically create or update the managed C/C++ Project Manager entry in .vscode/c_cpp_properties.json when a C/C++ workspace is opened or the selected installation changes. Disabled by default to avoid slowing Microsoft C/C++ IntelliSense; use the Sync IntelliSense command manually.

labwindowsCvi.autoAddCviFolderToWorkspac.description: Automatically add the precise C/C++ project root to the standard VS Code Explorer. Disabled by default to avoid unexpected workspace changes and large IntelliSense indexing scopes.

labwindowsCvi.uirTemplateVersion.description: Legacy CVI UI resource setting kept only for compatibility with imported workspaces.

labwindowsCvi.useCppToolsConfigurationPr.description: Deprecated compatibility switch. Dynamic C/C++ provider registration is no longer used because it can override IntelliSense outside C/C++ workspaces. The extension manages c_cpp_properties.json directly.
labwindowsCvi.useCppToolsConfigurationPr.deprecationMessage: Deprecated since 0.6.0. The dynamic provider is disabled permanently; use the generated c_cpp_properties.json configuration.

labwindowsCvi.intelliSenseCompilerPath.description: Optional explicit compiler executable used by Microsoft C/C++ IntelliSense. Leave empty to use the selected gcc/g++/clang toolchain.

labwindowsCvi.additionalIncludePaths.description: Additional include directories appended to the generated C/C++ IntelliSense configuration.

labwindowsCvi.enableSupplementalCompleti.description: Provide supplemental completion items parsed from active project sources only. Disabled by default to leave completion fully managed by Microsoft C/C++ and avoid extra work while typing.

labwindowsCvi.enableStandardLibraryCompl.description: Provide lightweight completion items for common C/C++ standard-library symbols only when the matching header is not already included. This avoids duplicates with Microsoft C/C++ IntelliSense while still allowing auto-include insertion before the header exists.

labwindowsCvi.standardLibraryCompletionA.description: When a standard-library completion item is accepted, insert the required #include if it is missing from the current file.

labwindowsCvi.showPersistentStatusBarAct.description: Show compact C/C++ Project Manager actions in the VS Code status bar. These actions remain available when the C/C++ Workspace view is collapsed.

labwindowsCvi.cCompilerPath.description: C compiler executable used by the generic build pipeline, for example gcc or an absolute MinGW gcc.exe path.

labwindowsCvi.cppCompilerPath.description: C++ compiler and linker executable used by the generic build pipeline, for example g++ or an absolute MinGW g++.exe path.

labwindowsCvi.archiverPath.description: Static-library archiver executable used for Static Library targets.

labwindowsCvi.debuggerPath.description: GDB executable used when launching the VS Code cppdbg debugger.

labwindowsCvi.outputDirectory.description: Directory, relative to the project file by default, used to store generic compiler objects and fallback targets.

labwindowsCvi.cStandard.description: C language standard passed as -std=<value>. auto does not pass a C standard flag.

labwindowsCvi.cppStandard.description: C++ language standard passed as -std=<value>. auto does not pass a C++ standard flag.

labwindowsCvi.compilerFlags.description: Additional flags passed to both C and C++ compilation commands.

labwindowsCvi.cCompilerFlags.description: Additional flags passed only to C compilation commands.

labwindowsCvi.cppCompilerFlags.description: Additional flags passed only to C++ compilation commands.

labwindowsCvi.linkerFlags.description: Additional flags passed to the final link command.

labwindowsCvi.includePaths.description: Additional include directories. Relative paths are resolved from the project file directory.

labwindowsCvi.libraryPaths.description: Additional library search directories passed as -L entries. Relative paths are resolved from the project file directory.

labwindowsCvi.libraries.description: Additional libraries passed to the linker. Values may be names such as m/ws2_32 or complete -l flags.

labwindowsCvi.useBuildModeArchitectureFl.description: When enabled, x86 modes add -m32 and x64 modes add -m64. Keep disabled if you select architecture by choosing a specific compiler path.
